name: ui-canvas-2d
description: Canvas2d — UI factory (1:1 with the @almadar/ui canvas-2d pattern).

schema.name: ui-canvas-2d
schema.description: Canvas2d — UI factory (1:1 with the @almadar/ui canvas-2d pattern).

emits.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click
Emits UI:{tileHoverEvent} with { x, y } on tile hover
Emits UI:{tileLeaveEvent} with {} on tile leave
Emits UI:{keyEvent} with { key } on keydown — for side/free keyboard control

events.name: Unit Click
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

events.name: Tile Hover
events.description: Emits UI:{tileHoverEvent} with { x, y } on tile hover

events.name: Tile Leave
events.description: Emits UI:{tileLeaveEvent} with {} on tile leave

events.name: Key
events.description: Emits UI:{keyEvent} with { key } on keydown — for side/free keyboard control

effects.label: Effects
effects.description: Active visual effects, drawn after units

tileSprites.label: Tile Sprites
tileSprites.description: Platform-type → tile sprite URL map for `side`.

spriteMaxWidthRatio.label: Sprite Max Width Ratio
spriteMaxWidthRatio.description: Max unit draw width as a ratio of scaledTileWidth. Default 0.6.

tiles.label: Tiles
tiles.description: --- Layer data (each an optional render pass) ---

diamondTopY.label: Diamond Top Y
diamondTopY.description: Override for the diamond-top Y offset within the tile sprite.

spriteHeightRatio.label: Sprite Height Ratio
spriteHeightRatio.description: Ratio of unit draw height to scaledFloorHeight. Default 1.5.

animate.label: Animate
animate.description: Opt-in internal RAF clock. DEFAULT OFF — the LOLO state machine drives the clock.

backgroundImage.label: Background Image
backgroundImage.description: Background image (tiled behind iso/hex/flat/free; stretched in side).

effectSpriteUrls.label: Effect Sprite Urls
effectSpriteUrls.description: Additional sprite URLs to preload (e.g., effect sprites)

unitScale.label: Unit Scale
unitScale.description: Extra scale multiplier for unit draw size. 1 = default.
